name: nxcurl
description: HTTP client CLI that returns structured JSON (status, headers, body) — use instead of curl when you need parseable API responses, persistent history, env-based {{VAR}} substitution, or HAR/Postman imports. Examples: `nxcurl run https://api.example.com/users -X GET --json`, `nxcurl run '{{BASE}}/items' -X POST -H 'Authorization: Bearer {{TOKEN}}' -d '{"name":"foo"}' -e prod --json`, `nxcurl history list --json`, `nxcurl history replay <id> --json`.
